title: Who will die in Final
wikitext:
[]: Who will die in Final.             Quote Post by EvangelionGodMode » Thu Sep 11, 2014 11:51 am Title says it all. Im gonna say Misato, Ritsuko, Rei ,gendo , and fuyutski. Or if Anno is really a dick he will do a complete 360 and let everyone live and just kill Shinji

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Thu Sep 11, 2014 12:03 pm I wouldn't mind Shinji dying. It's one of better outcomes for him anyway :P

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Thu Sep 11, 2014 12:09 pm 'born gonna 'born.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Sep 11, 2014 12:13 pm Depends on where Anno wants to take the story. Only characters that are a given I'd say are Gendo, Fuyutuski & Rei. Either he'll end on a really upbeat ending where all the heroes live. Or he'll go dark & angry in which case I wouldn't place bets on anyone but Shinji & Asuka (possibly Mari too) walking away at the end. Anywho, no body knows. But will interesting to see some people throw out ideas.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Thu Sep 11, 2014 12:38 pm I want a kill them all ending. And to make it even funnier for me, this time around, if there is indeed Instrumentality, I want Shinji to say no to allowing people out, have him be all "Nope, you bitches are staying in here this time, humanity doesn't deserve to continue"

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Thu Sep 11, 2014 12:49 pm I'm really tempted to say Asuka, just...I don't know, call it that gut instinct. Maybe even Mari, considering how much she throws herself into dangerous situations. ....Man, I got no clue: it's just so bleak!

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Thu Sep 11, 2014 12:55 pm Killing Mari will be Final's shit just got real moment.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Sep 11, 2014 12:55 pm Pen Pen will die in Final. It’ll be revealed that he survived the 14 years inside the 12 Angel, which is now inside Unit 13. Both he and Kaworu will pilot Unit 13 back to Willie so they can be with Shinji again. But it will be to no avail. Misato will be the one that kills him, of course. And because Final Impact will be stopped, this means that neither Pen Pen nor Kaworu will be able to join within Shinji ever again.

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Thu Sep 11, 2014 1:10 pm Because, naturally, we know that Pen-Pen was the crux to it all along. "Pen-Pen...I want to be better! I want to like myself! I want to be happy!" "WARK WARK WARK!" "You're right! I know you're right!" "WARK!" ....I agree with Chuckman, though: introduce the new fanservicey character, do nothing substantial with her until Third, and then boom! Down she goes, and you have all the fan favorites to torment left over.

[]:             Quote Post by Heaven Piercing Man » Thu Sep 11, 2014 1:33 pm It'd be more like a Shoo Out The Clowns moment.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Thu Sep 11, 2014 1:34 pm As much as it pains me, I predict all the new characters of 3.0 will be killed.....

[]:             Quote Post by artesox » Thu Sep 11, 2014 1:57 pm Gob Hobblin wrote: Because, naturally, we know that Pen-Pen was the crux to it all along. "Pen-Pen...I want to be better! I want to like myself! I want to be happy!" "WARK WARK WARK!" "You're right! I know you're right!" "WARK!" ....I agree with Chuckman, though: introduce the new fanservicey character, do nothing substantial with her until Third, and then boom! Down she goes, and you have all the fan favorites to torment left over.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Sep 11, 2014 2:05 pm I'm thinking that Shinji and Asuka are going to be alive, for sure. Mari might die, though. And I don't know what's going to happen with Rei's character. We could have a throwback to an EoE scenario where the two of them are alive at the end. However, I don't think prospects are that bleak for people dying. Yet.

[]:             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Thu Sep 11, 2014 2:12 pm Stillborn wrote: I wouldn't mind Shinji dying. It's one of better outcomes for him anyway :P

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Sep 11, 2014 2:29 pm Kill them all, let Yui-sama sort them out.

[]:             Quote Post by xyz346 » Thu Sep 11, 2014 3:14 pm For me, the only characters that I think are safe no matter what are Shinji and Rei Q...Asuka and Sakura being a close second. Meanwhile, the only character that I would be shocked if they didn't die is Gendo. followed by Fuyutsuki. Otherwise, it's fair game.

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Thu Sep 11, 2014 3:30 pm Ooh, Sakura! I forgot about her. She was nice to Shinji: that's like a death sentence right there.

[]:             Quote Post by ThanatosII » Thu Sep 11, 2014 3:41 pm Gob Hobblin wrote: Ooh, Sakura! I forgot about her. She was nice to Shinji: that's like a death sentence right there.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Sep 11, 2014 4:32 pm Shinji is assured to survive, Rei Q too: I doubt that Anno took all the pains to create that new character with the same face but a different path than Rei II only to have her meet the same end than her earlier version. Asuka too is assured to survive: we already got teased her death back in 2.0, and after all the shit she survived, killing her off now wouldn't make sense. I also don't think that the youngsters of the new character will die: they represent the future of mankind, its hope, so for me Sakura, Midori and Hideki are safe. All the rest are fair game. Gendo and Fuyu are already dead.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Sep 11, 2014 4:54 pm ThanatosII wrote: [Sakura] almost got killed by Shinji's Eva and her brother is dead (I think, right?).

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Thu Sep 11, 2014 12:03 pm I wouldn't mind Shinji dying. It's one
